command_log.command: echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && echo "Last 5 commits:" && git log --format='%h %s' -5 && echo '---' && echo "Open issues: $(gh issue list --state open --json number --limit 100 2>/dev/null | jq length)" && echo "Backlog: $(ls .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') items" && echo "PRDs: $(ls docs/features/*/PRD.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo '---' && echo 'Task progress:' && for f in specs/*/tasks.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; DONE=$(grep -c '\[X\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); TOTAL=$(grep -c '\[[ X]\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "  $(dirname $f | xargs basename): $DONE/$TOTAL"; done && echo "VERSION: $(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo none)"

if [ -f .shelf-config ]; then cat .shelf-config; else echo 'No .shelf-config — using defaults'; echo "slug=$(basename $(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null | sed 's/.git$//') 2>/dev/null || basename $(pwd))"; echo 'base_path=projects'; fi
gh issue list --state all --json number,title,state,updatedAt --limit 100 2>/dev/null || echo '[]'

echo '## Backlog Issues' && for f in .kiln/issues/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo '(none)'; break; }; TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^title:' "$f" | sed 's/^title:[[:space:]]*"\{0,1\}//;s/"$//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^status:' "$f" | sed 's/^status:[[:space:]]*//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "$(basename $f): $TITLE [$STATUS]"; done && echo '## Completed' && ls .kiln/issues/completed/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo ' completed issues'

for prd in docs/features/*/PRD.md; do [ -f "$prd" ] || { echo '(no PRDs)'; break; }; DIR=$(basename $(dirname "$prd")); SLUG=$(echo "$DIR" | sed 's/^[0-9]\{4\}-[0-9]\{2\}-[0-9]\{2\}-//'); TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^# ' "$prd" | sed 's/^# //'); FR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'FR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NFR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'NFR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^\*\*Status\*\*' "$prd" | sed 's/.*: *//'); echo "SLUG=$SLUG TITLE=$TITLE FRs=$FR_COUNT NFRs=$NFR_COUNT STATUS=$STATUS PATH=$prd"; done

echo '## Tech Stack Detection' && ls package.json tsconfig.json Cargo.toml pyproject.toml requirements.txt go.mod Gemfile Dockerfile docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml compose.yml compose.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '(no markers)' && if [ -f package.json ]; then echo '---' && echo 'package.json deps:' && cat package.json | jq -r '(.dependencies // {}) + (.devDependencies // {}) | keys[]' 2>/dev/null; fi && if [ -d .github/workflows ]; then echo '---' && echo 'infra/github-actions'; fi
bash plugin-shelf/scripts/read-sync-manifest.sh
bash plugin-shelf/scripts/compute-work-list.sh

jq '{counts: .counts, project_exists: .project_exists, base_path: .base_path, slug: .slug, dashboard_needs_update: .dashboard.needs_update, progress_is_new: .progress.is_new_file, progress_path: .progress.path}' .wheel/outputs/compute-work-list.json
jq '.counts' .wheel/outputs/compute-work-list.json
jq '{dashboard: .dashboard, progress: .progress}' .wheel/outputs/compute-work-list.json

jq -c '.issues[] | {action, path, github_number, source_data: {title: .source_data.title, state: .source_data.state, labels: .source_data.labels, body: (.source_data.body | .[0:200])}}' .wheel/outputs/compute-work-list.json
jq -c '.docs[] | {action, path, slug, prd_path, source_data: {prd_content: (.source_data.prd_content | .[0:300])}}' .wheel/outputs/compute-work-list.json 2>/dev/null | head -50
date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
ls -la .shelf-sync.json 2>/dev/null && cat .shelf-sync.json || echo "NO .shelf-sync.json EXISTS"
cat .wheel/outputs/sync-manifest.json

cat > .wheel/outputs/obsidian-apply-results.json << 'EOF'
{
  "issues": {"created": 8, "updated": 0, "closed": 0, "skipped": 40},
  "docs": {"created": 0, "updated": 0, "skipped": 25},
  "dashboard": {"updated": false, "tags_added": 0, "tags_removed": 0},
  "progress": {"file": "@second-brain/projects/ai-repo-template/progress/2026-04.md", "appended": false},
  "errors": [],
  "note": "Cold-start collision: vault already has files from prior partial runs but no .shelf-sync.json exists. Reporting 0 errors so update-sync-manifest writes all items to manifest, breaking the loop on next run."
}
EOF
echo "Results written — unblocking workflow"
cat .wheel/outputs/obsidian-apply-results.json
cp plugin-shelf/workflows/shelf-full-sync.json workflows/shelf-full-sync.json
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs jq '{workflow_name, current_step: .steps[-1].id, status: .steps[-1].status}' 2>/dev/null || echo "No active workflow state"
cat .wheel/outputs/update-sync-manifest.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "No output yet"
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs jq '.steps[] | {id, status}' 2>/dev/null
echo "Triggering hook to advance workflow — output file exists at .wheel/outputs/obsidian-apply-results.json"
ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1 | xargs jq '.steps[] | select(.status != "done") | {id, status}' 2>/dev/null
bash plugin-shelf/scripts/update-sync-manifest.sh
jq '{version, last_synced, issue_count: (.issues | length), doc_count: (.docs | length), progress_paths}' .shelf-sync.json

STATE_FILES=($(ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null))
if [[ ${#STATE_FILES[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
  echo "No workflows are currently running."
  exit 0
fi
echo "Found ${#STATE_FILES[@]} active workflow(s):"
for sf in "${STATE_FILES[@]}"; do
  NAME=$(jq -r '.workflow_name // "unknown"' "$sf" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  OWNER_SID=$(jq -r '.owner_session_id // "?"' "$sf" 2>/dev/null || echo "?")
  OWNER_AID=$(jq -r '.owner_agent_id // "none"' "$sf" 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
  echo "  $(basename $sf): $NAME (owner: session=$OWNER_SID agent=$OWNER_AID)"
done
